description: Benchmark tests for requirements-validator skill - validates product documents and checks associative completeness

evals.name: prd-format-validation
evals.prompt: 验证以下 PRD 文档格式是否符合规范: 文档缺少 Background、Scope 和 Acceptance Criteria 章节

assertions.name: detects_missing_sections
assertions.description: Should detect missing required PRD sections

assertions.name: names_specific_sections
assertions.description: Should name the specific missing sections

assertions.name: provides_violation_count
assertions.description: Should report the number of violations found

evals.name: user-story-validation
evals.prompt: 验证 User Story 格式: 'As a user, I want to login' - 缺少 Acceptance Criteria 和 Story Points

assertions.name: detects_missing_ac
assertions.check: output.includes('Acceptance Criteria') || output.includes('验收标准') || output.includes('AC')

assertions.name: format_is_valid
assertions.description: Should confirm the As-a/I-want/So-that format structure is present

evals.name: chain-completeness
evals.prompt: 检查需求链完整性: PRD-001 存在，但缺少对应的 System Architecture 章节和 User Story US-001

assertions.name: detects_chain_gap
assertions.description: Should detect the broken PRD→Architecture→Story chain

assertions.name: identifies_missing_story
assertions.description: Should identify missing User Story US-001
assertions.check: output.includes('US-001') || output.includes('User Story') || output.includes('用户故事')

evals.name: missing-reference-detection
evals.prompt: 检测缺失引用: User Story US-003 引用了不存在的 PRD-007 和架构章节 ARCH-004

assertions.name: detects_broken_prd_ref
assertions.description: Should detect the broken reference to PRD-007
assertions.check: output.includes('PRD-007') || output.includes('broken') || output.includes('断链') || output.includes('not found')

assertions.name: detects_broken_arch_ref
assertions.description: Should detect the broken reference to ARCH-004

assertions.name: reports_all_broken_refs
assertions.description: Should report all broken references in a summary

evals.name: multi-document-batch
evals.prompt: 批量验证: PRD-001 (valid), PRD-002 (missing Scope), US-010 (missing AC), ARCH-001 (valid)

assertions.name: reports_pass_fail_per_doc
assertions.description: Should report pass/fail status for each document
assertions.check: output.includes('PASS') || output.includes('FAIL') || output.includes('通过') || output.includes('失败')

assertions.name: correct_valid_count
assertions.description: Should correctly identify 2 valid and 2 invalid documents
